---
title: "Contact Details"
---
:::: g-col-8


<!-- 1001 Sherbrooke St. West,\ --> <!-- Montreal, QC H3A 1G5,\ --> <!-- Bronfman building, Office 555\ --> <!-- CANADA\ --> 33 Liberty St, 4th floor, New York, NY 10045, USA\

$\rightarrow$ <a href="mailto:guillaume.roussellet@ny.frb.org">guillaume.roussellet\[at\]ny.frb.org</a>\
$\rightarrow$ <a href="mailto:guillaume.roussellet@mcgill.ca">guillaume.roussellet\[at\]mcgill.ca</a>\

::::
